locations.name: 菲律宾
locations.summary: 菲律賓共和國（他加祿語：Republika ng Pilipinas；英語：Republic of the Philippines）簡稱菲律賓，是東南亞的群島國家。位於西太平洋，北隔呂宋海峽與臺灣相望，南隔西里伯斯海與印度尼西亚相望，西隔…

relations.subject: Negros leaf warbler
relations.evidence: It is found in the Philippines

relations.subject: Negros leaf warbler
relations.evidence: This species habitat is primary and secondary montane forest above 800 meters above sea level The IUCN does not yet recognize this as a full species but this species is not believed be threatened as it has a large range
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Negros leaf warbler
relations.evidence: However, deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
